Codex stability fixes plus platform-readiness refactors.

- Split additional app/runtime logic into smaller controller and tool-manager modules across Doctor repair, Rollback Center, release evidence, runtime diagnostics, startup classification, Headroom Learn, usage savings, repo-memory MCP, RTK, MarkItDown, and add-on managers.
- Tightened Repo Intelligence and repo-map evidence with deeper symbol references, repo ranking, graph diagnostics, supervised map generation, selected-pack context, and stale-proof gates.
- Improved release/updater proof, sidecar rollback boundaries, runtime failure reporting, connector/add-on polish, and manual rerun support for updater assets.
- Fixed tray sidebar alignment, Repo Intelligence top spacing, and home Auto-fix setup button busy/disabled state reporting.
